a:I[8172,["972","static/chunks/972-66d51a7cc4f97c94.js","196","static/chunks/196-f2bfcbb86a691470.js","246","static/chunks/app/post/%5Bid%5D/page-d539675d117d5f45.js"],"default"]
b:I[1255,["972","static/chunks/972-66d51a7cc4f97c94.js","196","static/chunks/196-f2bfcbb86a691470.js","246","static/chunks/app/post/%5Bid%5D/page-d539675d117d5f45.js"],"default"]
2:["$","div",null,{"className":"max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12","children":[["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/","className":"inline-flex items-center text-sm text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-500 dark:hover:text-gray-400 mb-12 transition-colors","children":[["$","svg",null,{"className":"w-4 h-4 mr-1","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","children":["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","strokeWidth":2,"d":"M15 19l-7-7 7-7"}]}],"返回"]}],["$","header",null,{"className":"mb-12","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-3xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 leading-tight","children":"我猜，他上次体检也是在婚检，那时他也26岁，我如今的年纪。"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-4 text-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500","children":[["$","time",null,{"className":"tabular-nums","children":"2025/04/27"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex gap-2","children":[["$","span","daily",{"className":"text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500","children":["#","daily"]}]]}]]}]]}],["$","article",null,{"className":"prose dark:prose-invert max-w-none","children":["$","$La",null,{"content":"给老爸预约上了体检的套餐，算是工作后主动给家人花的一笔钱了，意外的是，这次没有嫌我乱花钱。\n\n去年我还在新加坡的时候，听说了老妈因为骑电动车被车刮碰了一下，去的医院做了全身体检，结果意外查出了肺癌.....因祸得福的是，正是这次交通意外，才做了体检，查出了肺癌，得以有机会动手术。\n\n我妈的上次体检，是30几年前的婚检。那时检查出肝有问题，她总担心喂我奶水为传染给我，但又因为买不起奶粉，只能喂我奶水。\n\n我妈感慨“这次体检没想到肝竟然好了，肺又出了问题。”\n\n听了之后挺感慨的，人生第二次的体检竟然是因为意外的交通事故。\n\n我给爸爸也预约了一次体检，他收到预约成功的短信后，没有嫌弃我乱花钱，只是说，“查查吧，也已经好久没体检过了。”\n\n我猜，他上次体检也是在婚检，那时他也26岁，我如今的年纪。"}]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"postId":"121"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-16 pt-8 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800","children":["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/","className":"inline-flex items-center text-sm text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-500 dark:hover:text-gray-400 transition-colors","children":[["$","svg",null,{"className":"w-4 h-4 mr-1","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","children":["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","strokeWidth":2,"d":"M15 19l-7-7 7-7"}]}],"返回首页"]}]}]]}]
